zh.lifeSummary: 當Joshua Burris於1755年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州時，他的父親Joshua Burris55歲，母親Elizabeth Brookshire21歲。他於大約1772年與Sarah Mary Chamblee在美國南卡羅來納州安德森結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1800年住在美國南卡羅來納州朋德萊頓。他去世於1804年1月4日在美國南卡羅來納州安德森朋德萊頓享年49歲，埋葬在美國南卡羅來納州安德森莫特 特里薩礁 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joshua Burris于1755年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州时，他的父亲Joshua Burris55岁，母亲Elizabeth Brookshire21岁。他于大约1772年与Sarah Mary Chamblee在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1800年住在美国南卡罗来纳州朋德萊頓。他去世于1804年1月4日在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森朋德萊頓享年49岁，埋葬在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森莫特 特里薩礁 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Burris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Burrows  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrows
meanings: (mainly Sheffield): occasionally also a topographic name or occupational name for someone who lived or worked at a house with a chamber for conducting manorial business (Middle English bour, Old English būr ‘bower, chamber’, + hous ‘house’). Compare Burroughs and Burris .

variants.name: Burres
meanings: English: variant of   Burris   and   Burress   (see   Burrows  ).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burriss
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burress
meanings: English (Middlesex and Essex): variant of   Burris   (see   Burrows  ). This surname is now rare in Britain.
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Börries or Borries or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Joshua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘God is salvation’ in Hebrew; it is borne in the Bible by the Israelite leader who took command of the Children of Israel after the death of Moses and led them, after many battles, to take possession of the Promised Land. The name, long favoured by Jews and Nonconformist Christians, enjoyed a great surge in popularity in the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American pianist and conductor  Joshua Rifkin  (  b. 1944 ) and the American-born violinist  Joshua Bell  (  b. 1967 ).

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.

historicEvents.title: Edenton Tea Party
historicEvents.description: On October 25, 1774, the Edenton Tea Party took place. It was the first organized women's protest. They put their cups down and refused to buy any tea.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: South Carolina becomes the 8th state in the Union
historicEvents.description: On May 23, 1788, South Carolina ratifies the Constitution of the United States making it the 8th State of the Union.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

en.lifeSummary: When Joshua Burris was born in 1755, in North Carolina, British Colonial America, his father, Joshua Burris, was 55 and his mother, Elizabeth Brookshire, was 21. He married Sarah Mary Chamblee about 1772, in Anderson, South Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Pendleton, South Carolina, United States in 1800. He died on 4 January 1804, in Pendleton, Anderson, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 49, and was buried in Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joshua Burris est né en 1755, à Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Joshua Burris, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Brookshire, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Mary Chamblee environ 1772, à Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Pendleton, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis en 1800. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1804, à Pendleton, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joshua Burris 1755 in North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joshua Burris 55 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Brookshire 21. Er hat um 1772 in Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Mary Chamblee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1800 hat er in Pendleton, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 4. Januar 1804 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Pendleton, Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joshua Burris è nato il nel 1755 nel Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Joshua Burris, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Brookshire, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Mary Chamblee circa 1772, nel Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Pendleton, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1800. Morì il 4 gennaio 1804, nel Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joshua Burrisが1755年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州で生まれた時，父Joshua Burrisは55歳，母Elizabeth Brookshireは21歳であった。約1772年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンでSarah Mary Chambleeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1800年にはアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ペンドレトンに住んでいた。彼は1804年1月4日にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンペンドレトンで49歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンモウント タボル チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, South Caro: 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우트 타볼 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joshua Burris(이)가 1755년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joshua Burris(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Brookshire(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1772년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨에서 Sarah Mary Chamblee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1800년도에 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 펜들레턴에서 살았다. 그는 1804년 1월 4일 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 펜들레턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨 모우트 타볼 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joshua Burris nasceu em 1755, em Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, seu pai, Joshua Burris, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Brookshire, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Mary Chamblee aproximadamente 1772, em Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Pendleton, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América em 1800. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1804, em Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joshua Burris родился в 1755 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Joshua Burris было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Brookshire, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Mary Chamblee около 1772 г. в местности андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности пендлетон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в 1800 году. Он умер 4 января 1804 г. в местности пендлетон, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности маунт табор чурч, андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joshua Burris nació en 1755, en Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, su papá, Joshua Burris, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Brookshire, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sarah Mary Chamblee aproximadamente 1772, en Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en Pendleton, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos en 1800. Murió el 4 de enero de 1804, en Pendleton, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Mount Tabor Church, Anderson, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos.
